report.summary: Researched, wrote, SEO-optimized, and scaffolded a new learn guide on FOCIL (EIP-7805) inclusion lists and their role in the Glamsterdam roadmap.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: FOCIL = Fork-Choice enforced Inclusion Lists, specified as EIP-7805; leading censorship-resistance candidate for Glamsterdam (late 2026).
Design: 16 validators per slot form an inclusion list committee; block must include the union of their non-conflicting txs or lose fork-choice weight.
Key property: asymmetric security — attacker must bribe all 16, defender needs only 1 honest committee member.
Coexists with MEV-Boost and PBS; does not disturb tip extraction, only removes silent censorship.
Directly upgrades censorship resistance of based rollups and any L2 using L1 force-inclusion.
Open questions: conflict resolution between committee lists, list gossip latency, anti-spam.
No existing degen0x page covered FOCIL — gap confirmed via learn/ directory scan.

sections.title: Content Created
items: ~1,100-word intermediate-level learn guide with 7 sections: why inclusion lists exist, what FOCIL does, committee size rationale, Glamsterdam context, impact on users/L2s/builders, open questions, related reading.
6-question FAQ covering FOCIL basics, live status, differences from prior designs, MEV-Boost compatibility, user impact, based-rollup impact.

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Title tag: 'FOCIL & Inclusion Lists on Ethereum Guide 2026 | Degen0x'
Target keyword: FOCIL / EIP-7805 / Ethereum inclusion lists
Secondary keywords: Glamsterdam, censorship resistance, PBS, MEV-Boost, based rollups
Schemas added: Article schema + FAQPage schema (combined via combineSchemas)
OpenGraph + Twitter card metadata with og-focil-inclusion-lists-guide.svg reference
Canonical URL set; 4 internal links to related learn guides (Fusaka/Glamsterdam, Based Rollups, EIP-7702, DA Layer)

sections.title: Programmer Notes
items: Static page only — no interactive component required for this topic; follows existing learn-page template conventions (Breadcrumb, StructuredData, BackToTop, dark theme classes).
PUBLISH_QUEUE/PUBLISHED_PAGES directories not found in repo; page was placed directly under src/app/learn/ following the pattern of existing guides. Flag for publish-queue skill to confirm indexing.
